values.description: Backend API base URL. Change to your deployed URL in production.
JWT token. Auto-populated from the Set-Cookie header by the Login request test script. Do not set manually.
requestId of the most recent analyze call. Auto-saved by the Protected #4 Analyze request test script for use in session-lookup requests.

info.name: StaySense AI — Local Dev
info.description:
Environment variables for the StaySense AI Week 6 Auth API Collection.

How the JWT is populated:
1. Run Authentication / Login
2. The test script reads the `token` value from the Set-Cookie response header
3. It saves that value to the `jwt` environment variable here
4. All protected requests automatically use `Authorization: Bearer {{jwt}}`

Variables:
- baseUrl   : Backend API base URL
- jwt       : JWT access token (auto-populated by Login)
- lastRequestId : Most recent analysis session ID (auto-populated by Analyze)
